<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/commonmark package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\CommonMark\Extension\Embed; use League\CommonMark\Node\Node; use League\CommonMark\Renderer\ChildNodeRendererInterface; use League\CommonMark\Renderer\NodeRendererInterface; class EmbedRenderer implements NodeRendererInterface { /** * @param Embed $node * * {@inheritDoc} * * @psalm-suppress MoreSpecificImplementedParamType */ public function render(Node $node, ChildNodeRendererInterface $childRenderer) { Embed::assertInstanceOf($node); return $node->getEmbedCode() ?? ''; } }
